name: BugHD
description: Chinese crash and exception reporting service for mobile and web applications.

seo.title: BugHD — Crash Reporting
seo.meta_description: BugHD: Chinese crash and exception reporting service for mobile and web applications.

when_to_use: Crash reporting for Chinese Android apps distributed via local app stores
Exception monitoring for web apps deployed in Chinese market
Real-time error alerts integrated into Dingtalk or WeChat for dev teams
Stack trace collection for mobile crash triage in China-first products

pros: Low-cost crash/exception reporting for Chinese teams
Local data residency for Chinese market
cons: Smaller feature set than Sentry or Bugsnag
review.verdict: Budget crash reporting for Chinese apps; use established global vendors if you operate outside China.
review.best_for: Chinese mobile/web teams needing cheap basic crash reporting
review.not_for: Global apps wanting rich debugging and integrations
